subject: English
title: The Happy Prince – Hard Short Notes

key_points: The story explores moral values through symbolic characters
The prince gains awareness of suffering only after death
The swallow’s transformation reflects the power of empathy
The prince and swallow together represent selfless compassion
Their sacrifice is finally recognized as the most precious act
characters: The Happy Prince – Symbol of awakened conscience and generosity
The Swallow – Embodiment of loyalty and sacrifice
The Mayor – Representation of society’s superficial values
themes: Spiritual reward for kindness and sacrifice
literary_devices: Symbolism – The prince’s lead heart symbolizes enduring compassion
Irony – Society destroys the statue without recognizing its true value
Allegory – The story represents moral awakening and charity
exam_tips: Discuss symbolism of the prince’s heart and jewels
Explain the irony in the mayor’s actions
Connect the ending with the moral message of compassion
Highlight the spiritual recognition given by God
